name: Pumpkin Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: Whole wheat bread, day old (4 cups, cubed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread cubes, dates, and 1/3 of the pecans in a greased 2-quart shallow baking dish.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine milk, pumpkin, egg yolks, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, and cloves; beat well.
3. In a small mixing bowl, beat egg whites until stiff; fold into pumpkin mixture.
4. Pour over bread cubes and toss gently. Sprinkle with remaining nuts.
5. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 1 hour until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
6. Serve warm or chilled, with cream if desired.
